nasb.text: and they spoke, saying to Him, “Tell us by what authority You are doing these things, or who is the one who gave You this authority?”

esv.text: and said to him, “Tell us by what authority you do these things, or who it is that gave you this authority.”

cnv.text: 對他說：“告訴我們，你憑著甚麼權柄作這些事？給你這權柄的是誰？”

ccb.text: 质问祂：“告诉我们，你凭什么权柄做这些事？谁授权给你了？”

csbs.text: 对他说：“请告诉我们：你凭什么权柄做这些事？是谁给你这权柄的？”
